sync.title: Sync Quality
sync.description: BeamMP updates your vehicle position ~100 times per second, allowing for a smooth overall experience.

0.question: The server list is not showing up!
0.answer: Try restarting BeamMP as this can sometimes happen. If this fails to fix your issue please create a topic on our forum or visit the support channel on our discord.

1.question: How do I open a ticket in case something doesn't work or I have questions?
1.answer: Please check the #how-to-use channel in Discord and on our forum. Please give an accurate description of what you have done so the support team will help you in a fast and effective way.

2.question: Help! I'm getting error codes
2.answer: Please head over to our forum and see if anyone has had the issue before. It is likely that someone else has at some point and therefore there will also probably be a solution posted with it too in the replies. Alternatively visit our discord where the larger portion of community is currently based.

3.question: Does this work with pirated versions of BeamNG.drive?
3.answer: We don't know if it works with pirated versions of BeamNG.drive, but we will not provide any support to non legit copies of the game. Nor will we change to support it.

4.question: How do I host a server?
4.answer: The server files required for hosting your own server can be found at the top of this page below the client download. You will also require an authentication key which can be found from keymaster. Further information around the setup can be found on our docs.

5.question: Can I use mods?
5.answer: Mods are supported. These are installed on the server. See our docs for more information.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Live snapshot metrics from active servers and a player volume timeline. Releases can be annotated on the chart.
statistics.hint: Release markers are shown as orange vertical lines (e.g., v3.0.0, v4.0.0). Hover over data points for details.
statistics.server_hint: Server count follows similar trends. Release markers indicate major version launches.

about.title: About BeamMP
about.description: BeamMP brings multiplayer to BeamNG.drive. It’s built by and for the community, focusing on stability, performance, and an authentic driving experience shared with friends.

note.title: A Note from the Creator
note.content: BeamMP started with a simple idea: I want to play BeamNG.drive with my brothers. What began as an experiment quickly grew into a community-driven project focused on implementing multiplayer, and fun. We care deeply about trying to provide the best experience possible, and making it easy for players to hop in and enjoy driving together. The project is open to contributors of all skill levels. Whether you write code, moderate a server, design scenarios, or help others get set up—your efforts are part of what makes BeamMP thrive. Thank you for being here and helping us build something special.

points.0: Multiplayer sessions for BeamNG.drive with server browser and filters
points.1: Server-side moderation tools and configuration options
points.2: Mod support with protection for paid content
points.3: Active community channels (Forum, Discord) for help and collaboration

points.0: Community-first: decisions guided by real player/server needs
points.1: Reliability: prioritizing stability, sync fidelity, and performance where possible
points.2: Openness: welcoming contributions, feedback, and transparency
points.3: Safety: promoting fair play and respectful interactions

get_involved.title: Get Involved
get_involved.description: There are many ways to participate—join discussions, report issues, contribute code, or help to support the project financially via

funding.title: Funding & Sustainability
funding.description: BeamMP relies on community support. Donations help cover infrastructure, bandwidth, tooling, and development time. If you value the project and want to help it grow, please consider supporting us.

credits.title: Credits & Acknowledgements
credits.description: BeamMP is maintained by the Mod Team and an incredible group of community contributors. We’d also like to thank server owners, mod creators, testers, and everyone reporting issues—your time and passion keep the project moving forward.
credits.desc_2: Special thanks to the BeamNG.drive developers for creating such an amazing platform that makes multiplayer possible.
credits.desc_3: Also a heartfelt thank you to the following current and former community members for their significant contributions to BeamMP over the years:

mentions.0: Jojos38 (Co-Founder) - for their work early on with designing everything to help make the idea become a reality
mentions.1: Jetta (jetta.cat) - for the logo design and creation.
mentions.2: Anonymous275 & Lionkor - for their work in rebuilding the project in C++.
mentions.3: Tixx - for their considerable contributions across the project codebase.
mentions.4: And many more—thank you to everyone who has contributed in any way!

credits.thank_you: Together, we’re building something special. Thank you for being part of the BeamMP community!
